steps.title: Split the absolute value
steps.content:
The equation
$$
|x-9|=14
$$
means the expression inside the absolute value is $14$ or $-14$:
$$
x-9=14 \quad \text{or} \quad x-9=-14
$$

steps.title: Add the solutions
steps.content: Solve both equations and add the results: $$ x=23 \quad \text{or} \quad x=-5 $$ $$ 23+(-5)=18 $$ The answer is B.
